text.title: User Research at Scale Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example illustrating the methodology against a realistic input.

example.title: Weekly onboarding-friction study (N=612)
example.note: Intake queue: 612 sessions across 3 segments (free, paid, churned). Sampling: stratified by segment + tenure; recruit hit target. Transcribed via Otter (interviewer turns stripped via Looppanel). Frozen codebook of 84 codes applied via Sonnet batch; 14 novel themes parked in proposed_codes. Synthesizer (Opus) emitted 5 candidate findings; HITL review accepted 3 (>=50 evidence each), rejected 2 (<50 evidence). Accepted code: 'template_anxiety'; merged into book v37. Report published; throughput dashboard updated; no PII left ZDR endpoints.
